_meta.note: Simulated Slack feed of incoming organizational questions. The engine ingests these one at a time. Answers are graded against data/ground_truth/expert_answers.json.
_meta.generalization_pair: Q-001 teaches the 'symptom -> commit -> guideline' pattern; Q-002 is a NEW incident that should benefit from that lesson on its FIRST try (Reflexion Mode B).

questions.text: Why was the v4.2.0 release delayed?
Why did payments-gateway latency spike on June 10, and what was the real cause?
Who owns inventory-svc and who should I contact about a stuck inventory sync?
Why did we choose Postgres over DynamoDB for the orders database?
What is currently blocking the v4.3.0 release?
checkout-svc pods keep getting OOMKilled since yesterday's deploy. What is the root cause?
questions.note: FRESH incident — NO postmortem exists yet. Cause must be investigated from the recent commit + the caching guideline. Same family as Q-001 (symptom -> commit -> guideline).

questions.text: Login latency jumped to ~3s right after the latest deploy. Why?
questions.note: FRESH incident — NO postmortem exists yet. Same family as Q-002 (a sync call added to a hot path violating the service-call guideline).
